## Tags
call

## Categories
arrows, connectivity, devices, communication

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/phone-forwarded)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::PhoneForwarded;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        PhoneForwarded { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
